title: BTyper3 Module
description: A module for taxonomic classification of Bacillus cereus group isolates.

btyper3_virulence_identity.description: Minimum percent amino acid/nucleotide identity threshold for a virulence gene to be considered present

btyper3_virulence_coverage.description: Minimum percent coverage threshold for a virulence gene to be considered present

btyper3_identity.description: Minimum percent amino acid identity threshold for a Bt toxin gene to be considered present

btyper3_coverage.description: Minimum percent coverage threshold for a Bt toxin gene to be considered present

btyper3_overlap.description: Specify maximum proportion of overlap for overlapping Bt toxin genes to be considered separate genes

btyper3_opts.description: Additional options to pass to BTyper3
